unificar.boton_tooltip: Detect and merge entities with similar names
unificar.sin_ia: AI is required for this feature. Configure your provider in Settings.
unificar.necesita_dos: You need at least 2 entities to search for duplicates.
unificar.sin_candidatos: No entities with similar names found.
unificar.fusionando_subtitulo: This may take a few moments while the AI analyzes and combines all information.
unificar.error_no_json: The model did not return valid JSON.

multi_merge.intro: Act as an expert literary assistant. You must merge MULTIPLE Compendium entries that represent the SAME entity.
multi_merge.instruction_name: 1. Choose the most appropriate FINAL name. The "{{field}}" field MUST NOT be empty.
multi_merge.instruction_combine: 2. Combine the information from ALL entries COHERENTLY and fluidly.
multi_merge.instruction_rewrite: 3. Do NOT concatenate descriptions, REWRITE the content merging all relevant details.
multi_merge.instruction_golden_rule: 4. [GOLDEN RULE]: ONLY USE the information provided in the entries. Do NOT invent data, do NOT use information from other novels or external contexts.
multi_merge.instruction_json: 5. Return ONLY valid JSON with the requested structure.

legacy_merge.intro: Act as an expert literary assistant. You must merge two Compendium entries that represent the SAME entity but with slightly different names.
legacy_merge.instruction_name: 1. Choose the most appropriate FINAL name (prioritize "{{name}}" if correct). The "{{field}}" field MUST NOT be empty.
legacy_merge.instruction_combine: 2. Combine the information from both entries COHERENTLY and fluidly.
legacy_merge.instruction_rewrite: 3. Do NOT concatenate descriptions, REWRITE the content.
legacy_merge.instruction_keep_info: 4. If important information is missing in one entry but present in the other, KEEP IT.
legacy_merge.instruction_golden_rule: 5. [GOLDEN RULE]: ONLY USE the information provided in the entries. Do NOT invent data, do NOT use information from other novels or external contexts.
legacy_merge.instruction_json: 6. Return ONLY valid JSON with the requested structure.

vacio.subtitulo: Bring your world to life by adding the first entry.

eliminar.mensaje: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}" from the compendium?

formulario.completar_ia_tooltip: Magically extract details from your novel's text
formulario.completar_ia_error: Please enter at least a name or title before attempting to extract data.
formulario.completar_ia_entidad_cambiada: The AI process has stopped because you changed entities. The data has not been applied to avoid overwriting the new selected entity's information.

personajes.sin_personajes: Add more characters to the compendium to create bonds.

mpc.tooltip: Compendium proposals detected by the MPC
mpc.subtitulo: {{count}} possible entity detected in your text
mpc.subtitulo_plural: {{count}} possible entities detected in your text
mpc.empty_desc_1: The MPC will analyze your text as you write and suggest new entries for the Compendium.
mpc.empty_desc_2: For a complete manual scan of the scene, you must be in the Editor and select the text you want to scan.
mpc.scan_from_editor: Open a scene in the Editor to scan
